case_title: LAKIN, MICHAEL VS INTERNATIONAL EXECUTIVE RENTAL LLP et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF LAKIN, MICHAEL
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-18-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-31-2006 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUED TO 8/31/06 AT 8:30 A.M. TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE OLLIE MARIE VICTOIRE.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-31-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-04-2006 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 JUDGE VICTOIRE RECUSES HERSELF BECAUSE OF EX-PARTE COMMUNICATION BY DEFENDANT.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-04-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-18-2006 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TO BE HEARD BY COMMISSIONER SLAVIT

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAKIN, MICHAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT INTERNATIONAL EXECUTIVE RENTAL LLP $3,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,860.00, THE COURT AMENDS PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM TO NAME DEFENDANT INTERNATIONAL EXECUTIVE RENTAL LLP AS PARTY DEFENDANT; DEFENDANT FARZAWEH FARIBA, AN INDIVIDUAL, IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGMENT NUNC PRO TUNC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT INTERNATIONAL EXECUTIVE RENTAL LLP IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT LAKIN, MICHAEL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
